title: splitProps
description: Splits a props object into multiple groups by key. Preserves reactivity.
behavior: Takes the props object followed by one or more arrays of keys. Returns a tuple with one object per key group plus a remainder object containing all unmatched keys.
usage_bucket: The site publisher's <0>SiteBucket</0> splits the merged props into a <1>site</1> group holding the bucket name and document settings, leaving a <2>rest</2> group whose children render underneath the provisioned bucket.
usage_tenant: The tenant fleet's <0>TenantDatabase</0> splits its props into a <1>placement</1> group that provisions the database and a <2>service</2> remainder that flows on to the API tier.
in_the_wild: See these groups drive real provisioning in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
